capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formal security culture program?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal security culture program exists.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise security culture program exists

questions.prompt: Is the security culture program reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the security culture program is reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular security culture program efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formal security training program or service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise security training program exists.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise security training program or service exists

questions.prompt: Is the security training program reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the security training program is reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular security training program efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formal security awareness and culture program that covers both training delivery and culture outcomes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a combined awareness and culture program exists.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise security awareness and culture program exists

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise document KPIs and KRIs for security culture—including phishing report rates, policy acknowledgment, and human-risk scores?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether security culture KPIs and KRIs are documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for security culture

questions.prompt: Are security culture KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether culture KPIs are reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise document KPIs and KRIs for security training—including completion rates, overdue training, and phishing simulation metrics?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether security training KPIs and KRIs are documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for security training

questions.prompt: Are security training KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether training KPIs are reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Do executive and management leaders visibly model security behavior and communicate expectations?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether leaders model and communicate security expectations.
questions.evaluation_focus: Executive tone and visible security leadership

questions.prompt: Are managers held accountable for security culture outcomes in their teams?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether management accountability exists for culture outcomes.
questions.evaluation_focus: Management accountability for security culture outcomes

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a security champions or ambassador program that extends culture beyond the security team?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a security champions program exists.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal security champions or ambassador program

questions.prompt: Is the champions program reviewed at least quarterly for reach and effectiveness across business units?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the champions program is reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular champions program review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise reward security compliance and positive security behaviors through incentives or recognition?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether security compliance is rewarded.
questions.evaluation_focus: Rewarding security compliance and positive behaviors

questions.prompt: Are incentive and recognition programs reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether incentive programs are reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular incentive program efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise proactively develop or source security training content aligned to current risk priorities?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether security training content is proactively developed or sourced.
questions.evaluation_focus: Proactive development or sourcing of security education content

questions.prompt: Is the security training curriculum reviewed and refreshed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the training curriculum is reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular curriculum review and refresh

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise tailor security trainings for specific functional units and risk profiles?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether training is segmented by role and risk profile.
questions.evaluation_focus: Tailored security trainings for specific functional units

questions.prompt: Are different user segments—such as executives, finance, and engineering—assigned distinct security training paths?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether distinct training paths exist for user segments.
questions.evaluation_focus: Segmented security training for various user groups and risk profiles

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use a training delivery platform to assign, track, and report on security training enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise training delivery platform is used.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide training delivery platform

questions.prompt: Are training assignments, reminders, and completion tracking automated, with platform configuration reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether training delivery is automated with quarterly platform review.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated assignment, tracking, and reminders

questions.prompt: Do new hires and contractors complete mandatory security awareness training before accessing enterprise resources?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether onboarding security training is mandatory before access.
questions.evaluation_focus: Mandatory security awareness for new hires and contractors

questions.prompt: Is onboarding training compliance reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether onboarding training compliance is reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular compliance review of onboarding training

capability_questions.capability_name: Phishing simulation and social engineering drills

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise run phishing simulation campaigns on a defined cadence?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether phishing simulations run on a regular cadence.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular phishing simulation campaigns

questions.prompt: Are repeat phishing simulation failures remediated with additional training or coaching?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether repeat simulation failures trigger remediation.
questions.evaluation_focus: Remediation for repeat simulation failures

questions.prompt: Do developers receive secure-coding and SDLC security training appropriate to their role?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether developers receive secure-coding training.
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure coding and SDLC training for developers

questions.prompt: Do IT administrators and operations staff receive specialized operational security training reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether technical staff receive operational security training.
questions.evaluation_focus: Administrative and operational security training for IT roles

questions.prompt: Does security training cover AI-augmented attacks, deepfakes, and modern social engineering tactics?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether training addresses AI-era attack techniques.
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-augmented attack and social engineering awareness

questions.prompt: Does training address shadow AI risks and approved versus unapproved AI tool usage?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether shadow AI and approved-tool training is provided.
questions.evaluation_focus: Shadow AI and approved-tool usage training

questions.prompt: Do employees feel safe reporting security concerns, near-misses, and mistakes without fear of retaliation?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether psychological safety exists for security reporting.
questions.evaluation_focus: Psychological safety for reporting security concerns

questions.prompt: Is the reporting culture assessed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether reporting culture is assessed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular assessment of reporting culture

questions.prompt: Does the workforce understand why security measures are in place and how they protect the organization?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the workforce understands security measure rationale.
questions.evaluation_focus: Workforce understanding of why security measures exist

questions.prompt: Do you validate workforce security understanding through surveys or assessments at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether workforce understanding is validated quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular validation of workforce security understanding

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise measure security culture through surveys, behavioral metrics, and feedback loops?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether security culture is measured through multiple channels.
questions.evaluation_focus: Security culture surveys and behavioral metrics

questions.prompt: Are culture improvement actions tracked and reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether culture improvement actions are tracked and reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular culture measurement review and action tracking
